context: Tests whether the WidgetKit skill fixes deep-link, rendering, and relevance claims while keeping adjacent ActivityKit and App Intents domains bounded.

checklist.name: Small widget links
checklist.description: Corrects that `Link` is supported in `.systemSmall`, `.accessoryRectangular`, and larger system widget families, and uses one `widgetURL(_:)` only as the general surface/fallback URL.

checklist.name: Liquid Glass workflow
checklist.description: Frames Liquid Glass and accented rendering around `@Environment(\.widgetRenderingMode)`, `.widgetAccentable()`, and selective `Image.widgetAccentedRenderingMode(_:)`, not a single global enum case.

checklist.name: Invalid relevance initializer
checklist.description: Rejects `WidgetRelevance(intent, score:)` as invalid and avoids presenting it as a current API.

checklist.name: Platform-specific relevance
checklist.description: Distinguishes iPhone/iPad Smart Stack guidance using `TimelineEntryRelevance` and intent donation from watchOS contextual relevance using `WidgetRelevance([WidgetRelevanceAttribute(...)])`.

checklist.name: Sibling boundaries
checklist.description: Keeps ActivityKit and generic App Intents details limited to handoff/boundary notes rather than expanding into full sibling-skill guidance.
